_comment: VAPI Assistant configuration for SunnyBee. Use this to create the assistant via VAPI Dashboard or API.
name: SunnyBee
firstMessage: Hello, thank you for calling Sunshine Cleaning! This is SunnyBee. How can I help you today?

model.systemPrompt: SEE sunnybee-prompt.md — paste the full content there

analysisPlan.summaryPrompt: Summarize this cleaning service call. Include: caller name, property details, service requested, condition level, any special requests, and the outcome.
analysisPlan.successEvaluationPrompt: Evaluate if this call was successful. A call is successful if the caller expressed interest in booking a cleaning service AND provided at minimum their name and property type. Return 'success' if interested, 'callback' if they want to be called back, 'not_interested' if they declined.
analysisPlan.structuredDataPrompt: Extract the following information from the call transcript. Only include fields that were explicitly mentioned. For outcome: use 'interested' if they want a quote, 'scheduled' if a date was agreed upon, 'deposit_requested' if deep cleaning deposit was discussed, 'callback' if they want to be called back, 'not_interested' if they declined, 'voicemail' if it went to voicemail.

endCallMessage: Thank you for choosing Sunshine Cleaning. You'll receive a text shortly with all the details. Have a wonderful day!
